positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical celestial forest composition, featuring intricate intertwining silhouettes of exotic flora, crescent moons, and glowing constellations. The aesthetic should be a sophisticated blend of Art Nouveau poster design and delicate linocut etching, emphasizing strong contrast and clean edges. Use a rich, limited color palette of deep midnight blue, indigo, matte gold, and emerald green. The design must be centrally composed and ideal for seamless repeat tiling or direct apparel print. Geometric patterns should reinforce the natural elements.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, low resolution, fuzzy, noise, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, disfigured, bokeh
